since_last: 38% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.70%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.69% · Gold +0.95% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 38% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.70%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.70%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.26%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -4.62%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +3.57%, PUBM +2.43%, HON +1.63%, NOW +1.32%, WDAY +1.30%. Laggards: MU -4.62%, ARM -4.15%, MRVL -3.97%, VRT -3.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.69% at $150.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
